title: T-017 — SCN-010 Login screen UI (06-a)
prompt:
# T-017 — SCN-010 Login

PRD: 06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §8.1 FR-SC-FE-002
UX: design/06-SCANNER-P1-UX.md:183-203 §3.1
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/login.jsx:5-56 (label login_screen)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Render SCN-010 login screen — logo 72×72, username input, password input, card scan input (scan-first), 'Użyj PIN' secondary button — wired to a Server Action calling /api/scanner/login (T-006).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/login/page.tsx` — Server Component renders form; Client Component handles ScanInput.
2. Server Action `loginAction(state, formData)` calls `/api/scanner/login` → on success Set-Cookie + router.push('/scanner/pin' if PIN required else '/scanner/site-select').
3. RHF + zod resolver for username/password (fallback path) and ScanInput for card scan.
4. Card barcode lookup via `/api/scanner/lookup/auto/<barcode>` (T-010); kind='user_badge' shortcut for badge scans (extend lookup type whitelist).

## Files
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/login/page.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/login/login-form.client.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/login/login.action.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/__tests__/scn-010-login.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the production page renders, when compared to `design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/login.jsx:5-56`, then it has the 72×72 logo, username + password inputs, the card scan ScanInput, and the 'Użyj PIN' secondary button in the same order — RTL snapshot + manual checklist (structural + visual + interaction parity)
2. Given the user types valid username + password and submits, when the Server Action runs, then it POSTs /api/scanner/login and on 200 redirects to /scanner/site-select (or /scanner/pin/setup if pin_rotation_required)
3. Given the user scans an invalid card barcode, when the ScanInput emits, then a red flash + error banner appears with code SC_INVALID_BARCODE and the form remains focused

## Test strategy
- RED: write scn-010-login.test.tsx asserting parity + happy-path redirect + invalid-card error before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test scn-010-login'

## Risk red lines
- Do not store password in any client state beyond the form scope
- Do not redirect to /scanner/home before a site is chosen
- Do not skip the 'Użyj PIN' affordance

pipeline_inputs.description: SCN-010 login page with username/password + card scan + Użyj PIN button wired to /api/scanner/login.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Parity checklist:
1) 72×72 logo at top.
2) Username then password inputs.
3) ScanInput for card under credentials.
4) Secondary 'Użyj PIN' button below.
5) Order matches login_screen prototype.
6) Invalid card barcode renders red flash + error banner.
7) Successful submit redirects to /scanner/site-select (or /scanner/pin/setup when rotation required).
out_of_scope: Do not implement SCN-011 PIN entry here (T-018)
Do not implement SCN-011b/c PIN setup/change here (T-019/T-020)
Do not implement SCN-012 site/line/shift here (T-021)
acceptance_criteria: Given the production page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/login.jsx:5-56, then it has 72×72 logo, username+password inputs, card ScanInput, 'Użyj PIN' button in the same order — RTL snapshot + manual checklist

Given valid username + password submitted, when the Server Action runs, then POST /api/scanner/login is invoked and 200 redirects to /scanner/site-select (or /scanner/pin/setup if pin_rotation_required)
Given an invalid card barcode scan, when ScanInput emits, then a red flash + SC_INVALID_BARCODE banner is shown and the form remains focused
test_strategy: RED: write scn-010-login.test.tsx asserting parity + redirect + invalid-card error before implementation
risk_red_lines: Do not store password in any persistent client state
Do not redirect to /scanner/home before site selection
